segments.text: Give unto the LORD, O you mighty ones, Give unto the LORD glory and strength.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: ye mighty: Heb. ye sons of the mighty

segments.text: Give unto the LORD the glory due to His name; Worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: the glory of his name: Heb. the honour of his name
in his glorious sanctuary: or, in his glorious sanctuary

segments.text: The voice of the LORD is over the waters;
The God of glory thunders; The LORD is over many waters.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The voice of the LORD is powerful; The voice of the LORD is full of majesty.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: full of majesty: Heb. in majesty

segments.text: The voice of the LORD breaks the cedars, Yes, the LORD splinters the cedars of Lebanon.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He makes them also skip like a calf, Lebanon and Sirion like a young wild ox.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The voice of the LORD divides the flames of fire.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The voice of the LORD shakes the wilderness; The LORD shakes the wilderness of Kadesh.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The voice of the LORD makes the deer give birth, And strips the forests bare; And in His temple everyone says, 'Glory!'
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: to calve: or, to be in pain
doth discover: or, every whit of it uttereth, etc

segments.text: The LORD sat enthroned at the Flood,
And the LORD sits as King forever.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The LORD will give strength to His people; The LORD will bless His people with peace.
segments.speaker: God
